name: autonomous-pr-loop
description: Human On Loop Codex control plane for observable, recoverable Codex workflow loops.

interface.shortDescription: Turn long-running Codex workflows into observable Human On Loop systems.
interface.longDescription: A portable Codex plugin for durable workflow state, gates, evidence, hooks, worker orchestration, and the first bundled PR delivery workflow.
